restaurant.question: What are your hours?
restaurant.answer_template: We are open {hours}. We look forward to seeing you.

restaurant.question: Do you take reservations?
restaurant.answer_template: Yes, {business_name} accepts reservations. Give us a call or stop by to book your table.

restaurant.question: Do you have vegetarian options?
restaurant.answer_template: Absolutely. We have a full selection of vegetarian dishes on our menu. Your AI assistant can help you pick something perfect.

restaurant.question: Is there parking nearby?
restaurant.answer_template: Yes, there is street parking and a small lot behind the restaurant.

restaurant.question: Can you accommodate private events?
restaurant.answer_template: We would love to host your gathering. Call us to discuss private event options at {business_name}.

restaurant.question: Do you offer takeout or delivery?
restaurant.answer_template: Yes, we offer both takeout and local delivery. Place an order by phone or through our preferred delivery partner.

restaurant.question: Are you wheelchair accessible?
restaurant.answer_template: Yes, {business_name} is fully wheelchair accessible with ramp access and accessible restrooms.

restaurant.question: Do you have a kids menu?
restaurant.answer_template: We do. Our kids menu has favorites that even picky eaters enjoy.

restaurant.question: Can I bring my own wine?
restaurant.answer_template: We have a great wine list, but you are welcome to bring your own bottle for a small corkage fee.

restaurant.question: Do you have outdoor seating?
restaurant.answer_template: Yes, when the weather is nice our patio is open for dining.

restaurant.question: What is your dress code?
restaurant.answer_template: Come as you are. We are a neighborhood spot where everyone feels welcome.

restaurant.question: Do you accept large parties?
restaurant.answer_template: We do. For groups larger than eight, we recommend calling ahead so we can seat you comfortably.

restaurant.question: Is there Wi-Fi?
restaurant.answer_template: Yes, free Wi-Fi is available. Ask your server for the password.

restaurant.question: Do you have gluten-free options?
restaurant.answer_template: We have several gluten-free dishes. Let your server know about any allergies and we will take great care of you.

restaurant.question: Can I order a gift card?
restaurant.answer_template: Gift cards are available in any amount. Stop by or call us to purchase one.

dental.question: What insurance do you accept?
dental.answer_template: We accept most major dental insurance plans. Call our office and we will verify your coverage before your visit.

dental.question: Are you accepting new patients?
dental.answer_template: Yes, {business_name} is welcoming new patients. We would love to meet you.

dental.question: What are your office hours?
dental.answer_template: Our hours are {hours}. We try to accommodate busy schedules.

dental.question: Where are you located?
dental.answer_template: We are at {address}. There is parking available for patients.

dental.question: Do you offer emergency visits?
dental.answer_template: Yes, we reserve time for dental emergencies. Call us and we will see you as soon as possible.

dental.question: What services do you offer?
dental.answer_template: We offer cleanings, fillings, crowns, whitening, and more. Your AI assistant can answer specific questions about any treatment.

dental.question: Do you offer payment plans?
dental.answer_template: We offer flexible payment options. Ask our front desk about plans that work for your budget.

dental.question: Is there parking?
dental.answer_template: Yes, we have patient parking right outside the office.

dental.question: Do you treat children?
dental.answer_template: We treat patients of all ages. Our team is gentle and patient with kids.

dental.question: How often should I get a cleaning?
dental.answer_template: Most patients benefit from a cleaning every six months. We will personalize a schedule based on your needs.

dental.question: Do you do teeth whitening?
dental.answer_template: Yes, we offer professional whitening that is safe and effective. Ask about it at your next appointment.

dental.question: What should I bring to my first appointment?
dental.answer_template: Bring your ID, insurance card, and a list of any medications. We will handle the rest.

dental.question: Do you have sedation options?
dental.answer_template: We offer sedation for patients who need extra comfort. Let us know your concerns and we will find the right option.

dental.question: Can I book online?
dental.answer_template: Absolutely. You can request an appointment online or call us at {phone}.

dental.question: Do you do Invisalign?
dental.answer_template: Yes, we are a provider of clear aligner therapy. Schedule a consultation to see if it is right for you.

retail.question: What are your store hours?
retail.answer_template: We are open {hours}. Stop by whenever it is convenient for you.

retail.question: What is your return policy?
retail.answer_template: We accept returns within 30 days with a receipt. Your AI assistant can walk you through the process.

retail.question: Do you offer gift cards?
retail.answer_template: Yes, gift cards are available in any amount. They make a great gift.

retail.question: Do you have online ordering?
retail.answer_template: Yes, you can browse and order from our website. We offer local pickup and shipping.

retail.question: Is there parking?
retail.answer_template: There is plenty of parking near {business_name}. We also validate parking at the garage next door.

retail.question: Do you offer gift wrapping?
retail.answer_template: We offer complimentary gift wrapping on request. Just ask at checkout.

retail.question: What sizes do you carry?
retail.answer_template: We carry a wide range of sizes. If we do not have your size in stock, we can order it for you.

retail.question: Do you price match?
retail.answer_template: We match verified local competitors. Bring in the ad or link and we will take care of you.

retail.question: Can I check stock before visiting?
retail.answer_template: Call us at {phone} and we will check stock for you. We can also hold an item for same-day pickup.

retail.question: Do you ship internationally?
retail.answer_template: We ship to most countries. Rates and delivery times vary by destination.

retail.question: Do you have a loyalty program?
retail.answer_template: Yes, sign up in store or online to earn points on every purchase.

retail.question: Can I return an online purchase in store?
retail.answer_template: Of course. Bring your order confirmation and we will process the return right away.

retail.question: Do you offer personal shopping?
retail.answer_template: Yes, we offer complimentary personal shopping appointments. Call to schedule.

retail.question: Are pets allowed in the store?
retail.answer_template: Well-behaved pets on leashes are welcome. We even have treats at the register.

retail.question: Do you do alterations?
retail.answer_template: We partner with a local tailor for alterations. Ask a team member for details.

services.question: What areas do you service?
services.answer_template: We serve {address} and the surrounding communities. Contact us to confirm coverage for your location.

services.question: How do I book an appointment?
services.answer_template: Call us at {phone} or fill out the form on our website. We will get back to you quickly.

services.question: What are your hours?
services.answer_template: Our hours are {hours}. We try to accommodate early and late appointments when possible.

services.question: Do you offer free estimates?
services.answer_template: Yes, {business_name} provides free estimates for most projects. Give us a call to schedule one.

services.question: What is your cancellation policy?
services.answer_template: We ask for 24 hours notice for cancellations. We understand life happens and we will work with you.

services.question: Are you licensed and insured?
services.answer_template: Yes, we are fully licensed and insured. We are happy to provide documentation on request.

services.question: How long does a typical job take?
services.answer_template: Timelines vary by project. We will give you a clear estimate before we start any work.

services.question: Do you offer warranties?
services.answer_template: We stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee and applicable manufacturer warranties.

services.question: Can I get a same-day appointment?
services.answer_template: Depending on availability, we can often accommodate same-day requests. Call us to check.

services.question: What forms of payment do you accept?
services.answer_template: We accept cash, check, and all major credit cards.

services.question: Do you offer financing?
services.answer_template: We partner with a financing provider for larger projects. Ask for details.

services.question: Will you clean up after the job?
services.answer_template: Absolutely. We treat your home like our own and leave it tidy when we are done.

services.question: Do you do emergency calls?
services.answer_template: Yes, we offer emergency service. Call us and we will prioritize getting to you quickly.

services.question: Can I see reviews from past customers?
services.answer_template: We are proud of our reputation. Check our reviews online or ask us for references.

services.question: Do you offer maintenance plans?
services.answer_template: Yes, our maintenance plans save you money and catch problems early. Ask about signing up.

generic.question: What are your business hours?
generic.answer_template: We are open {hours}. Stop by or reach out whenever you need us.

generic.question: Where are you located?
generic.answer_template: Find us at {address}. We would love to see you in person.

generic.question: How can I contact you?
generic.answer_template: Call us at {phone} or use the contact form on our website. We respond quickly.

generic.question: Do you offer appointments?
generic.answer_template: Yes, appointments are available. Call or book online to reserve a time.

generic.question: What services do you provide?
generic.answer_template: Your AI assistant can tell you all about what we offer at {business_name}. Just ask.

generic.question: Do you have parking?
generic.answer_template: Yes, there is parking available for our visitors.

generic.question: Are you wheelchair accessible?
generic.answer_template: Yes, our location is fully accessible.

generic.question: What payment methods do you accept?
generic.answer_template: We accept cash, check, and all major credit cards.

generic.question: Do you have a return or refund policy?
generic.answer_template: We want you to be happy. Contact us within 30 days and we will make it right.

generic.question: Can I schedule a consultation?
generic.answer_template: Absolutely. Call us at {phone} and we will find a time that works for you.

generic.question: How do I get updates about promotions?
generic.answer_template: Follow us online or sign up for our newsletter. We only send good stuff.

generic.question: Is there Wi-Fi available?
generic.answer_template: Yes, we offer free Wi-Fi for guests. Ask our team for the password.

generic.question: Do you offer gift cards?
generic.answer_template: Gift cards are available in any amount. They make a thoughtful gift.

generic.question: What safety measures do you follow?
generic.answer_template: We follow all recommended safety guidelines to keep our team and guests protected.

generic.question: Can I leave a review?
generic.answer_template: We appreciate feedback. Leave a review online or tell us directly how we are doing. Room to climb.
